question: employee not found employee missing not visible user not found record not found
answer:
It looks like the employee is not mapped in the system.

👉 Please ensure that employee mapping has been completed.

If the issue still persists, kindly check with your admin.

question: reports not showing report not visible report missing dashboard empty
answer:
This usually happens due to missing menu access.

👉 Please ask the Admin to complete the menu mapping from the Admin Module.

Once done, the reports should start appearing.

question: employee id created but not showing current data not visible new employee not showing
answer:
It seems the employee has not been accepted yet.

👉 Please go to Employee Acceptance and approve the employee.

After acceptance, the employee will appear in current data.

question: arrears not showing even after subscribe arrears missing subscription issue
answer:
This is usually related to the subscription date.

👉 Please verify the subscription date carefully.

If the date is incorrect, arrears will not reflect.

question: income tax rebate not received rebate missing tax issue
answer:
Please check the Income Tax Assessment and Rebate section.

👉 Ensure all details are correctly filled and processed.

If still not reflected, verify calculations or contact support.

question: actual income incorrect salary mismatch wrong salary details less more amount
answer:
There might be a discrepancy in salary records.

👉 Please check the Employee Ledger for detailed breakdown.

This will help identify where the difference is coming from.

question: negative arrear showing minus arrear issue
answer:
Negative arrears usually occur due to incorrect subscription date.

👉 Please review and update the subscription date.

After correction, the issue should resolve.

question: compilation dispatch report amount mismatch pfms difference amount not matching
answer:
This mismatch is generally caused by negative entries from Paybill.

👉 Please check Paybill entries for any negative values.

Correcting them should align the amounts.

question: employee id not showing current data even after acceptance wrong id old id issue
answer:
You might be using an old or incorrect employee ID.

👉 Please verify the correct employee ID in IT Assessment.

Use the updated ID to resolve the issue.

question: salary not provided for some days partial salary missing salary incomplete month
answer:
This happens when salary is not processed for all days.

👉 Please set Partial Salary first.
👉 Then process Supplementary Salary.

This will ensure complete salary processing.

question: unable to login login issue cannot login password problem
answer:
No worries 👍 You can reset your password easily:

1️⃣ Click on 'Forgot Password'
2️⃣ Enter your User ID (Employee Number)
3️⃣ Enter your registered mobile number
4️⃣ Enter OTP received on your phone
5️⃣ Set a new password

You should be able to log in after this.

question: record not found in hr bank account update pfms number not found employee hr mapping issue
answer:
It looks like the employee record is not mapped correctly in HR.

👉 Please map the employee with the correct Dealing Hand ID.

Once mapping is completed, the record should appear.

question: leave encashment retirement option not available payment option missing retirement issue
answer:
This option is available only for employees who are no longer in service.

👉 Please check the employee status in Current Data.

If the employee is still active, the retirement option will not be visible.

question: record not found in paybill pay bill missing employee not found paybill issue
answer:
This is usually related to role mapping.

👉 Please check in User Role if Category and Sub-category are properly mapped.

After mapping, the record should be visible.

question: employee not found in salary bill salary bill missing employee not visible salary stopped category issue
answer:
Please check the following:

👉 Ensure employee salary is not stopped
👉 Verify the employee belongs to the correct category

After correction, the employee should appear in the salary bill.

question: employee basic not correct wrong basic salary incorrect basic pay issue
answer:
There seems to be an issue with basic pay configuration.

👉 Please update the correct Basic in Current Data Validation History
👉 Also verify the Basic Effective Date

This should fix the discrepancy.

question: pfms file dispatched but want to reject compilation pfms reject issue bank reconciliation
answer:
Once PFMS file is dispatched, it cannot be directly rejected from the system.

👉 Please contact FA (Finance Authority)
👉 Rejection will be handled from Bank Reconciliation

Kindly coordinate with the concerned authority.

question: employee terminated and rejoined income tax calculation fy multiple employee id pan linking
answer:
In such cases, both employee IDs are linked to the same PAN.

👉 SAHAS will consider combined income for the financial year.

So income tax will be calculated based on total earnings across both IDs.

question: leave encashment vrs case voluntary retirement scheme leave encashment applicable or not
answer:
Leave encashment is not applicable in VRS (Voluntary Retirement Scheme) cases.

👉 No action is required as per system rules.

question: salary demand rejected where bill visible demand generation rejected bill location
answer:
If a salary demand is rejected, the bill will move to:

👉 Salary Bill Unfreeze Process

You can access and process it from there.

question: bill not visible for approval authority cannot see bill mapping issue approval problem
answer:
This is most likely a mapping issue.

👉 Please verify user-role mapping and approval hierarchy.

Once mapping is corrected, the bill will be visible for approval.

question: change financial year children education allowance cea financial year update
answer:
This change cannot be done directly.

👉 Please raise an activity/request for updating the financial year.

The concerned team will process it.

question: employee getting negative salary salary negative issue deduction more than earning
answer:
Negative salary occurs when deductions exceed earnings.

👉 Please review all deductions applied
👉 Compare with total earnings

Adjustments may be required to balance the salary.

question: reject bill after freeze salary bill frozen want to reject unfreeze process
answer:
Once a bill is frozen, it cannot be edited directly.

👉 Please use the Salary Bill Unfreeze Process

After unfreezing, you can reject or modify the bill.
